_comment_skeletal_mesh: Content path to the skeletal mesh asset (e.g. /Game/Characters/Meshes/SK_Mannequin). Leave empty to skip.
_comment_anim_blueprint: Content path to the Animation Blueprint asset (e.g. /Game/Characters/Animations/ABP_Character). Leave empty to skip.
_comment_yaw_offset: Degrees to rotate the mesh so its forward matches movement direction. Use 90 or -90 if the mesh faces sideways.
